articles.listHeadline: FOOTBALL: Coaching changes at top programs

articles.subHeadline: National Sophomore of the Year Roye Oliver III headlines three players selected from Hamilton.
Seven-time defending Florida state champ St. Thomas Aquinas has most selections with four led by five-star offensive tackle Mark Matthews.
Florida, Texas, Georgia and Ohio combine to produce nearly 100 quarterfinal starters.
Dick Butkus, Herman Boone and Herschel Walker also recognized.
State champs from Alabama, Ohio, Texas and Kansas round out the top five.
Jeremiyah Love, Fernando Mendoza, Diego Pavia or Julian Sayin set to become next recipient of college football's highest honor.
No. 5 Santa Margarita takes on No. 15 De La Salle in California on Saturday night.
